description: Manual entries override new-postals.json. marker_nudge: fine-tune after fly-to. calibration.worldLabelNudgeLat/Lng: extra Leaflet units (≈ PNG px) for world→map only. calibration.affine: optional { px:[a,b,c], py:[d,e,f] } mapping world X,Y to PNG pixels (py down) — fit with OCR vs new-postals; omit to use axis bounds below.
